privateSection.title: How private deployment works (staged)
privateSection.subtitle: Keep data in your hands first, then increase on-prem inference gradually.

s0.title: Private data + cloud inference
s0.desc: Docs/vector store/logs stay on your side; inference calls cloud models with minimal context.

s1.title: Local embeddings + cloud model
s1.desc: Embeddings run inside your network; cloud models only receive necessary snippets.

s2.title: Local embeddings + local LLM
s2.desc: Inference also runs on-prem, with observability, audit, and cost controls.

privateAI.title: Private AI Model Deployment
privateAI.description: Worried about public AI APIs leaking secrets? We build fully controllable on-prem LLM environments on K8s. Data never leaves your network.

knowledgeBase.title: Enterprise Smart Knowledge Base
knowledgeBase.description: Transform your docs, wikis, and chats into conversational AI assets. Employees ask questions, AI delivers answers. 50%+ efficiency boost.

enterpriseWeb.description: Cost-effective digital upgrade. In one weekend, get a beautiful website and a 24/7 AI receptionist that auto-captures leads and answers queries.

security.title: Enterprise-Grade Security
security.description: Built-in PII masking, RBAC, and audit logs. Meet GDPR, SOC2, and internal security requirements.

fineTuning.title: Model Fine-Tuning & Training

devops.title: DevOps & Cloud Native Managed Services

consulting.title: AI Enablement Consulting & Training

privateAIPage.securityDesc: Public AI APIs are convenient but pose significant risks for enterprise intellectual property. Our Private AI solution ensures your data never leaves your VPC.
privateAIPage.sovereigntyDesc: Complete control over training data and inference logs.
privateAIPage.complianceDesc: Meet GDPR, HIPAA, and internal security audit requirements.

privateAIPage.boundaryDesc: We do not promise “magic private AI”. We promise staged delivery, verifiable security and usability, with explicit cost and performance constraints.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: We focus on delivery boundaries and acceptance criteria.

0.a: Scope, content scale, delivery form, and compliance needs vary widely. We quote by deliverables, milestones, and acceptance criteria to avoid misleading pricing.

1.q: What’s needed to ship a first version?
1.a: Clear content boundaries and target users, a defined interaction rhythm, plus minimal tracking and review metrics. We usually start with a pilot.

2.q: Do you support private or hybrid deployment?
2.a: Yes, when needed. We roll it out in stages: keep data on your side first, then increase inference and audit capability.

3.a: Send context and goals via the contact page. We’ll return a draft engagement proposal (modules, milestones, acceptance criteria) to align before implementation.

about.title: About Arrislink
about.subtitle: An engineering team focused on content asset upgrades
about.missionP1: Founded in 2017, we’ve delivered web products, data systems, and cloud-native infrastructure. We focus on shipping, reliability, and sustainable iteration.
about.missionP2: In the current stage, we focus on content asset upgrades: turning books and knowledge content into interactive digital deliverables, then building data loops for iteration and retention.
about.techStackValue: Content engineering · Product engineering · System engineering · Security · AI engineering

boundary.title: Capability boundary
boundary.subtitle: We focus on running systems with clear loops and clear delivery scope.

content.title: Content restructuring
content.desc: Structure and modularize content, reorder chapters, and rewrite for interaction.

productize.title: Productization
productize.desc: Upgrade content into camps, check-ins, assessments, surveys, and internal training tools.

system.title: System capability
system.desc: Configurable content systems, user behavior tracking, analytics, and reusable frameworks.

hero.title: Star-Points
hero.subtitle: Replace nagging with agreements. Record progress with points. From ages 3 to 15, we have the right growth plan. Weekly reviews that bring love and rules together.

taskSystem.title: Task System: Make commitments count, make persistence visible
taskSystem.subtitle: Use 'must-do' to build baselines, use 'quests' to unlock potential. Say goodbye to nagging, let children learn to be responsible for themselves.

optional.title: Optional Tasks
optional.desc: Post or claim tasks. Encourage the child to proactively choose and complete.

must.title: Must-do List
must.desc: Time-window based basics. Must be completed on time, with a healthy remediation path.

quest.title: Quests
quest.desc: 7/14-day short cycles. Earn milestones and badges, build sustainable momentum.

flow.title: From commitment to achievement
flow.note: A task is a traceable commitment: who claimed it, when it was done, and who confirmed it.

rulesWindow.title: Rules & Rhythm: Turn disputes into consensus
rulesWindow.subtitle: Two layers: boundaries (don’t do) and basics (must do). Time windows reduce daily explaining.

rules.title: Boundaries (don’t do)
rules.desc: Record triggers with explainable consequences—avoid emotional escalation.

remedy.title: Remediation: Give mistakes a chance to be corrected
remedy.desc: Not just punishment: make-up, downgrade completion, and rule tuning for next week.

templates.title: Age Templates: 0 to usable in 10 minutes
templates.subtitle: Enable first, then tweak points and frequency for your family.

rankingBadges.title: Growth Marks: Record every shining moment
rankingBadges.subtitle: Default to family/small groups, and focus on trends—compete with yourself first.

leaderboard.title: Family mini-board: See each other's efforts
leaderboard.desc: Help guardians see differences in execution and give kids visible positive feedback.
leaderboard.b1: Family/class small scope by default (no global ranking)
leaderboard.b2: Trend-first: streak, completion rate, rule stability
leaderboard.b3: Self-compare view to reduce comparison anxiety

badges.title: Badges are behavior evidence, not decoration
badges.desc: Make persistence, initiative, and review habits visible and shareable.

rewardStore.title: Reward Store: sustainable motivation with a family budget
rewardStore.subtitle: No random promises, no heavy operations. Use budget and frequency to keep rewards sustainable.
rewardStore.q1: Experiences: amusement park / movie / special dinner
rewardStore.q3: Privileges: extra screen time / choose weekend activity
rewardStore.q4: Relationship: 1:1 time / build a project together
rewardStore.b1: Weekly budget and cooldown: avoid overspending and bargaining
rewardStore.b2: Fully customizable: match each family's reality
rewardStore.b3: Child participates in choosing: autonomy and cooperation

card.title: Smarter rewards, not more expensive rewards
card.desc: A reward works when it’s redeemable, predictable, and sustainable—not when it’s a one-off刺激.
card.i1: Low: ice cream / stickers / +15 min free time
card.i2: Mid: Pizza Hut / a blind box / weekend choice right
card.i3: High ritual: amusement park / family trip / a dedicated day

tools.title: Props & Kits: Add some warmth to rules
tools.subtitle: Use 'immunity cards' to embrace occasional mistakes, use 'review cards' to open deep conversations. Make rules no longer cold.
tools.b1: Waiver card: keep the record, waive one deduction
tools.b2: Review card: trigger a guided review / report add-on (optional AI)
tools.b3: Redeem tickets: convert growth points to rewards

card.title: Fairness needs auditability
card.desc: Each tool records time, reason, and approver—better collaboration at home.

theory.title: Scientific Parenting: Make love wiser
theory.subtitle: Ground daily behavior guidance in practical family education principles.

pillars.title: Three key elements
pillars.b1: Clear rules: agreements, timely feedback, traceable records
pillars.b2: Sustainable motivation: choice, progress, and support
pillars.b3: Reviewable rhythm: time windows, rewards, weekly review

assessments.title: Light assessments: no diagnosis, only recommendations

a1.title: Temperament / traits
a1.desc: Recommend coach style: encourager / referee / storyteller / empath.

a2.title: Execution style
a2.desc: Identify procrastination/distraction triggers and suggest task mix and windows.

a3.title: Reward preference
a3.desc: Experience / physical / privilege / relationship—suggest store structure.

assessments.output: Outputs must become actions: template choice, task mix, reward bundle, review focus.

theory.note: Assessments provide tendencies and suggestions only—no medical/psychological diagnosis.

rules.title: Rules & Points: turn chaos into execution
rules.subtitle: Tasks (+), violations (-), and a traceable ledger for fair and explainable parenting.

tasks.title: Tasks (Points+)
tasks.desc: Brush teeth, reading, exercise, tidy up—set frequency and points.

constraints.title: Boundaries (Points-)
constraints.desc: Clear rules reduce emotional escalation and inconsistency.

ledger.title: Ledger (Auditable)
ledger.desc: Every point change has a reason and history for collaboration.

templates.title: Age Templates: enable first, then tweak

t35.title: Self-care & Emotions
t35.desc: Build rule awareness and positive feedback loops.

coupon.title: Penalty-Free Coupon: a cooling mechanism
coupon.subtitle: Keep the event record, but allow a one-time penalty waiver to de-escalate conflict.
coupon.b1: Redeem with points as a negotiation tool
coupon.b2: Every usage is auditable: time, event, approver
coupon.b3: Weekly limit recommended to avoid abuse

features.title: Key Features
features.subtitle: Conquer information overload, build your knowledge system

collect.title: Multi-source Collection
collect.desc: Forward articles or links to our service account for instant saving. PDF upload supported.

summary.title: AI Deep Processing
summary.desc: AI auto-generates one-line summaries, key tags, and mind map outlines.

connect.title: Knowledge Linking
connect.desc: AI finds connections to articles you've saved before, building your knowledge graph.

chat.title: Chat-based Retrieval
chat.desc: Search your knowledge via natural language: 'What was that K8s article about from last week?'

status.title: Product Status
status.desc: AI Smart Read is being carefully crafted and will launch as a WeChat Service Account + Mini Program. Built on our enterprise RAG engine. Stay tuned!

footer.description: Turn great content into digital products people come back to: restructure → productize → data loop.
footer.productsHint: Modular capability you can assemble into deliverables
